about.label: Who we are
about.title: A federation serving the
about.p1: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. FPBA-CI gathers the industry around a shared vision: structuring, standardising and promoting the manufacture of reinforced concrete poles in Côte d'Ivoire.
about.p2: Duis aute irure dolor in reprehenderit in voluptate velit esse cillum dolore eu fugiat nulla pariatur. We support our members in standards compliance, access to public markets, technical training and advocacy.
about.vision_text: Make the Ivorian reinforced concrete pole a sub-regional reference through innovation, quality and producer solidarity.
about.mission_text: Represent, support and defend reinforced concrete pole manufacturers across the national territory.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.desc: We act with transparency and ethics in every professional relationship.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.desc: We promote the highest standards of quality and industrial safety.

proximity.title: Solidarity
proximity.desc: We bring industry players together for a strong and united sector.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.desc: We encourage modern and sustainable manufacturing processes.

products.label: Our products
products.title: A full range of
products.subtitle: Discover the pole families produced by FPBA-CI member companies. Every product meets standards in force in Côte d'Ivoire and the ECOWAS area.

electric.title: Electric poles
electric.desc: Poles for low and medium-voltage distribution networks, compliant with CIE specifications.

telecom.title: Telecom poles
telecom.desc: Supports for telecom and fibre-optic networks, designed for national operators.

lighting.title: Street-lighting poles
lighting.desc: Poles for urban, peri-urban and road lighting — elegant and durable.

fence.title: Fence poles
fence.desc: Secure fencing solutions for industrial, agricultural and residential sites.

custom.title: Custom poles
custom.desc: Engineering and production of special poles based on customer specifications.

accessories.title: Accessories & hardware
accessories.desc: Complementary parts needed for pole installation and operation.

services.label: Our services
services.title: What we offer our
services.subtitle: FPBA-CI provides its members with a set of services designed to structure their activity and strengthen the industry.

representation.title: Representation
representation.desc: Representing the sector before public authorities and customers.
representation.fullDesc: FPBA-CI gives manufacturers a voice with the Ministry, CIE, local authorities and donors. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.
features: Interface with CIE and telecom operators
representation.why: A single, structured voice carries much further than isolated initiatives.

accompaniment.title: Support
accompaniment.desc: Technical, legal and financial support for member companies.
accompaniment.fullDesc: Our experts assist members in structuring their production facilities, accessing financing and ensuring compliance. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.
accompaniment.why: Structured support secures growth and professionalises practices.

training.title: Training
training.desc: Continuous training programmes for operators, technicians and managers.
training.fullDesc: We design and deliver training modules tailored to the concrete pole trades: reinforcement, vibration, demoulding, quality control, safety.
training.why: Upskilling teams is the primary lever of product quality.

standardization.title: Standardisation
standardization.desc: Definition, update and promotion of technical standards for the industry.
standardization.fullDesc: We run the technical commissions that draft and revise Ivorian reinforced concrete pole standards together with CODINORM and end users.
standardization.why: A shared standard guarantees quality, protects consumers and structures the market.

information.title: Information & Watch
information.desc: Sector, market, regulatory and tender intelligence.
information.fullDesc: Members receive a regular newsletter, access to a document platform and real-time tender alerts.
information.why: The right information at the right time makes the difference in competitive markets.

networking.title: Networking
networking.desc: Events, B2B meetings and trade missions to grow your business.
networking.fullDesc: Trade shows, technical days, meetings with customers and international missions: many opportunities to grow your network.
networking.why: A structured network accelerates business opportunities and best-practice sharing.
